name: RaceIQ F2
summary: Qualifying, race, and championship forecasts for FIA Formula 2.
description: First fully operational expansion beyond F1. Runs end-to-end on the shared core: standings, leakage-safe pace estimation, Plackett-Luce qualifying + race probabilities, and a Monte Carlo championship projection, with a full website. ~74% of the pipeline and ~77% of the website are reused MotorsportVerse infrastructure. Results currently come from a reproducible latent-pace model pending a live F2 feed.
